toolArgs.query:
INSERT INTO todos (id, title, description, status) VALUES
  ('T-001', 'Project Scaffolding & Xcode Setup', 'Create Xcode project StreamCaster with bundle ID com.port80.app. SPM deps (HaishinKit v2.0.x, KSCrash v2.0.x). Info.plist with privacy descriptions and UIBackgroundModes:audio. StreamCaster.entitlements. StreamCasterApp.swift @main entry. AppDelegate.swift. Assets.xcassets with brand colors. Empty DependencyContainer.swift. Two schemes: StreamCaster + StreamCaster-Sideload.', 'pending'),
  ('T-002', 'Data Models & Protocol Contracts', 'Define all shared structs, enums, protocols: TransportState, MediaState, BackgroundState, RecordingState, StopReason, StreamSessionSnapshot, StreamStats, EndpointProfile, StreamConfig, Resolution, ThermalLevel. Plus protocols: StreamingEngineProtocol, ReconnectPolicy, DeviceCapabilityQuery, SettingsRepository, EndpointProfileRepository, OverlayManager, ThermalMonitor, AudioSessionManager, EncoderBridge.', 'pending'),
  ('T-003', 'DI Container & Factories', 'Wire all protocol bindings in DependencyContainer.swift. Protocol-based factories providing app-scoped singletons.', 'pending'),
  ('T-004', 'SettingsRepository (UserDefaults)', 'Implement non-sensitive settings persistence using UserDefaults. Resolution, fps, bitrate, orientation, ABR toggle, camera default, reconnect config, battery threshold.', 'pending'),
  ('T-005', 'EndpointProfileRepository (Keychain)', 'CRUD for RTMP endpoint profiles with Keychain Services. kSecAttrAccessibleWhenUnlockedThisDeviceOnly. URL parsing, embedded key extraction, normalized base URL storage. KeychainHelper wrapper.', 'pending'),
  ('T-006', 'DeviceCapabilityQuery', 'Query AVCaptureDevice.DiscoverySession + formats. Filter out 60fps on Tier 1 (A10/A11) devices. Read-only — never activates camera.', 'pending'),
  ('T-007a', 'StreamingEngine Core (Lifecycle & State Machine)', 'MainActor singleton with private actor StreamingSessionCoordinator. @Published sessionSnapshot and streamStats. EncoderBridge protocol with stub. startStream/stopStream async idempotent. State machine transitions.', 'pending'),
  ('T-007b', 'StreamingEngine HaishinKit Integration', 'Replace EncoderBridge stub with real HaishinKit implementation. RTMPConnection + RTMPStream. Delegate callbacks. 1Hz stats polling. Camera/audio attach.', 'pending'),
  ('T-008', 'NowPlayingController', 'MPNowPlayingInfoCenter + MPRemoteCommandCenter. pauseCommand maps to mute. stopCommand maps to stop-stream with reconnect cancellation. togglePlayPause with 500ms debounce.', 'pending'),
  ('T-009', 'ConnectionManager (Reconnect)', 'RTMP connect/disconnect, auto-reconnect with exponential backoff + jitter. NWPathMonitor. Cancel retries on user stop. No retry on auth failure. Submits intents to engine coordinator.', 'pending'),
  ('T-010', 'StreamViewModel', 'Observe StreamingEngine @Published properties. Project StreamSessionSnapshot + StreamStats for SwiftUI. Preview view lifecycle. Combine subscriptions in cancellables set.', 'pending'),
  ('T-011', 'Camera Preview View', 'UIViewRepresentable wrapping HaishinKit MTHKView. Lifecycle management via Coordinator. No strong UIView references across SwiftUI redraws.', 'pending'),
  ('T-012', 'Stream Screen UI', 'Start/Stop button, mute, camera-switch, status badge, recording indicator. HUD overlay with bitrate, fps, duration, connection status, thermal badge.', 'pending'),
  ('T-013', 'Runtime Permissions Handler', 'SwiftUI-compatible permission flow for Camera, Microphone, Photos Library. Rationale alerts, denial handling (open Settings), mode fallback.', 'pending'),
  ('T-014', 'Orientation Lock Logic', 'Lock orientation via supportedInterfaceOrientations. Lock at stream start. Unconditional lock when active. Unlock only when idle.', 'pending'),
  ('T-015', 'Settings Screens', 'Resolution picker, fps picker, bitrate controls, audio settings, ABR toggle, camera default, orientation, reconnect config, battery threshold. SettingsViewModel.', 'pending'),
  ('T-016', 'Endpoint Settings Screen', 'RTMP URL input, stream key, username/password, Test Connection button, Save as Default, profile CRUD list. Transport security warnings.', 'pending'),
  ('T-017', 'SwiftUI Navigation', 'NavigationView with routes: Stream, EndpointSetup, VideoAudioSettings, GeneralSettings.', 'pending'),
  ('T-018', 'RTMPS & Transport Security', 'System TLS enforcement. Hard-reject secret-bearing plaintext RTMP. Anonymous plaintext allowed. TransportSecurityAlert view.', 'pending'),
  ('T-019', 'ABR System', 'ABR ladder per device capabilities. Bitrate-only reduction first. Resolution/fps step-down. Recovery. Backpressure detection. AbrPolicy and AbrLadder.', 'pending'),
  ('T-020', 'EncoderController', 'Swift actor serializing quality changes from ABR + thermal. requestAbrChange and requestThermalChange. Cooldown for thermal restarts. Blacklist oscillating configs.', 'pending'),
  ('T-021', 'Thermal Monitoring', 'ProcessInfo.thermalStateDidChangeNotification. ThermalLevel mapping. Progressive degradation with 60s cooldown. .critical stops stream.', 'pending'),
  ('T-022', 'Audio Session Interruption', 'AVAudioSession.interruptionNotification. On .began: mute mic. Resume only on explicit user unmute. Coordinate with mute toggle.', 'pending'),
  ('T-023', 'Low Battery Handling', 'UIDevice.batteryLevel monitoring. Configurable warning threshold (default 5%). Auto-stop at ≤ 2%. Finalize local recording.', 'pending'),
  ('T-024', 'Background Camera Interruption', 'AVCaptureSession interruption handling. Stop video track on camera loss. Keep audio-only if audio active. Re-acquire camera on foreground return.', 'pending'),
  ('T-026', 'KSCrash Crash Reporting', 'Configure KSCrash with credential redaction and HTTPS-only transport. #if !DEBUG guard. Custom report filter using CredentialSanitizer.', 'pending'),
  ('T-027', 'App Termination Recovery', 'Detect orphaned recording files on launch. Show session-ended message. wasStreaming UserDefaults flag. No automatic stream resumption.', 'pending'),
  ('T-028', 'Connection Test Button', 'Lightweight RTMP handshake probe. 10s timeout. Obeys transport security rules. Actionable result messaging.', 'pending'),
  ('T-029', 'Mute Toggle (Engine Logic)', 'Implement mute/unmute in StreamingEngine via AudioSessionManager. Update published snapshot immediately.', 'pending'),
  ('T-030', 'Camera Switching', 'Front/back via RTMPStream.attachCamera(position:). Before and during stream.', 'pending'),
  ('T-031', 'Prolonged Session Monitor', 'Warn after 90min on devices with <3GB RAM. Suppress if charging.', 'pending'),
  ('T-032', 'Info.plist & Entitlements Hardening', 'Privacy usage descriptions, UIBackgroundModes:audio, PiP entitlement, ATS config. No NSAllowsArbitraryLoads.', 'pending'),
  ('T-037', 'Overlay Architecture Stub', 'OverlayManager protocol + NoOpOverlayManager default implementation.', 'pending'),
  ('T-038', 'Structured Logging & Secret Redaction', 'os.Logger wrapper with .private annotations. Redacted<T> wrappers. CredentialSanitizer. HaishinKit log suppression for release. RedactingLogger.', 'pending'),
  ('T-042', 'Internal Metrics Collection', 'Counters for encoder init, reconnect, thermal, storage errors, PiP, permissions. MetricsCollector + debug view.', 'pending'),
  ('T-043', 'Security Curtain', 'View covering window on sceneWillResignActive to hide preview in App Switcher.', 'pending');
